mcq:
The letter _____ yesterday.
a) write b) wrote c) was written d) is written

Rice _____ in Egypt.
a) grows b) is grown c) was grown d) grew
tf: In passive voice, the object becomes the subject. [True/False]
We use 'have been' + past participle for passive present perfect. [True/False]
short: Change to passive: They built the bridge in 2020
Write a sentence in passive present continuous

mcq:
He said, 'I am tired'. → He said that he _____ tired.
a) am b) was c) is d) were

'Where do you live?' → She asked me where I _____ .
a) live b) lived c) am living d) was living
tf: In reported speech, we usually change the tense one step back. [True/False]
short: Change to reported question: 'Do you like coffee?' he asked

mcq:
If you heat ice, it _____ .
a) melts b) will melt c) melted d) would melt

If I had money, I _____ a car.
a) will buy b) would buy c) bought d) buy
tf: Type 0 conditional is used for general truths. [True/False]
Type 2 conditional refers to real future situations. [True/False]
short: Complete: If I were you, I _____

mcq:
Cutting down too many trees causes:
a) Afforestation b) Deforestation c) Reforestation d) Pollution

Air pollution can cause:
a) Clean air b) Respiratory problems c) Good weather d) Rain
tf: Burning plastic is good for the environment. [True/False]
short: What can we do to protect the environment?
long: Write an essay about how to reduce pollution

mcq:
She _____ English for 5 years.
a) learns b) learned c) has learned d) has been learning

I had finished my homework before my father _____ home.
a) comes b) came c) will come d) come
tf: Present perfect continuous shows duration from past to present. [True/False]
Past perfect is used for an action that happened before another past action. [True/False]
short: Write a sentence using 'have been working'
Change to past perfect: She left before I arrived

mcq:
You _____ wear a helmet when riding a bike.
a) can b) should c) might d) would

It _____ rain tomorrow. The sky is cloudy.
a) must b) might c) should d) can
tf: 'Could' is used for present ability only. [True/False]
short: Give advice using 'should' for a student who is lazy

mcq:
The man _____ lives next door is a doctor.
a) who b) which c) where d) when

This is the book _____ I borrowed from the library.
a) who b) which c) where d) when
tf: We use 'who' for people and 'which' for things. [True/False]
We can use 'that' for both people and things. [True/False]
short: Combine: The girl is my sister. She is wearing a red dress
Write a sentence using 'where' as a relative adverb

mcq:
In the future, robots _____ most of the housework.
a) do b) did c) will do d) are doing

Artificial Intelligence helps us _____ problems faster.
a) lose b) solve c) forget d) hide
tf: Technology will have no effect on education in the future. [True/False]
We should learn how to use technology responsibly. [True/False]
short: Predict how life will be in 2050
long: Write about the advantages and disadvantages of AI
